aeo_readiness.summary: While the business has a strong local presence, it lacks the necessary structured data and conversational content to be cited by AI models effectively.
quick_wins: Create and publish an FAQ page with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, accurate hours, and a high rating, but it could benefit from more Q&A engagement and regular posts.
critical_issues: Lack of recent posts or updates on GBP.
No active management of Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and detailed how-to guides.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding FAQ schema and creating content that answers common HVAC queries.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the business as the go-to expert by publishing detailed guides and obtaining relevant certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for Answer Engine Optimization.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AEO, the business misses out on 40% of potential leads from AI assistants and conversational searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The absence of schema markup and FAQ content significantly limits AI model citations.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI recommendations.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.
